posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Event Title: Process optimization and efficiency with monday.com
Date: January 21, 2025
Time: 08.30 - 12.00 CET
Speaker(s): Benjamin Poliak, monday.com Presales and Andreas Sunde: Agile Coach, Culture & New Ways of Working at Posten Norge and Torstein Finberg CEO hos Solid Media A/S

Agenda

  • 08:30 – 08:50: Ankomst og frokost
  • 08:50 – 09:05: Velkommen med Enablen Consulting
  • 09:05 – 09:45: Introdukjon til monday.com med Benjamin Poliak, Head of Global Presales
  • 09:45 – 10:15: Brukererfaringer med Andreas Sunde, Agile Coach, Culture & New Ways of Working at Posten Norge
  • 10:15 – 10:30: Pause
  • 10:30 – 11:00: Brukererfaringer med Torstein Finberg, CEO hos Solid Media A/S
  • 11:05 – 11:45: Fremtiden, AI og ekspert tips om monday.com
  • 11:45 – 12:00: Q&A

posts.author: Boiker (Brendon)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, being in Australia, and as much as I am committed to learning best practice in monday.com, these hours won’t work for me . So any chance I can watch a recording?

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: This was an in-person session, so I do not have a recording available, unfortunately! @Boiker! But we will work hard to have recordings available more often!

posts.author: Boiker (Brendon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jasmine

Thanks for getting back to me and hopefully there will be another one for Australia!

Brendon
